revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Information page/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Information page/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Information page/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Information page/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Information page/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Information page/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Distinguish|Template:Information}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{Auto short description|conditions=when it is used in Wikipedia, Help, or User space}} {{#if:{{{howto|}}} |{{distinguish|text = the article tone dispute tag, [[Template:How-to]]}} | }} This is the page banner template for [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to{{!}}Wikipedia how-to|information pages{{!}}Wikipedia information pages}}]]. It can be placed on top of [[WP:GOVPS|administration pages]] (not-articles) when appropriate (see [[WP:INFOPAGES]] for details). This usually means pages in the "Wikipedia:" and "Help:" namespaces, but sometimes {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to guides|information pages}} also exist as user subpages. == Categorization == If a page that uses this template is in the "Wikipedia:" or "Help:" [[WP:Namespace|namespace]], then this template adds [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]] to the page. If the page is in the [[WP:User pages|"User:"]] namespace, it will be put into [[:Category:User essays]]. If your page is just a draft, please use the {{para|nocat}} parameter to prevent categorization, until it is finished. If it is in some other namespace, it will not be auto-categorized, and it may be in the wrong place. == Usage == This template can be used as is, like this: :{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} But it can also take up to three [[Wikipedia:Shortcut|shortcuts]] as parameters. It then displays a small shortcut box inside it. Like this: :{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|WP:SHORT|WP:LONG}} Then it looks like this: {{ {{BASEPAGENAME}}|WP:SHORT|WP:LONG|demo=y}} If you want to feed more than one or two shortcuts then the shortcut box becomes too high, which doesn't look good. In such a case it is better to use a {{tlc|shortcut}} box directly {{em|below}} this template, like this: {{block indent|1= {{tlx|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}
{{tlx|shortcut|WP:SHORT|WP:SHORT2|WP:SHORT3|WP:SHORT4}} }} === Optional parameters === * {{para|1}} or {{para|sc1}}, {{para|shortcut1}}, {{para|shortcut}}, or first unnamed parameter – First [[WP:Shortcut|shortcut]]. Don't include [[...]] linking brackets in this or other shortcut parameters. * {{para|2}} or {{para|sc2}}, {{para|shortcut2}}, or first unnamed parameter – Second shortcut * {{para|3}} or {{para|sc3}}, {{para|shortcut3}}, or first unnamed parameter – Third shortcut (deprecated; please use separate [[Template:Shortcut]] for three or more) * {{para|interprets}} or {{para|page}} or {{para|pages}} – Specify name of page (policy, process, etc.) that this essay provides advice about. For a single page, it is not necessary to include [[...]] linking brackets;. This will replace the wording "{{#if:{{{howto|}}}|some aspect or aspects of Wikipedia's norms and practices|Wikipedia's norms and practices}}". If more than one page and/or any notes are intended, links must be manually coded, e.g.: {{para|interprets|[[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] policy and the [[Wikipedia:Identifying reliable sources]] guideline}} * {{para|sort-by}} – Specify a [[WP:Categorization#Sort keys|sort key]] for the category. For example, if the how-to page is [[Wikipedia:Producing maps with xplanet]] and you want it category-sorted to appear under "X", use {{para|sort-by|Xplanet, Producing maps with}}. This has no effect on the user essays category. * {{para|category}} – Specify a complete wikilink (i.e, {{em|do}} include the [[...]] linking brackets) to one or more categories to override the default [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]]. May include a category sort; example: [[Category:WikiProject Underwater Basketweaving|Article structure advice]] This parameter does not replace the [[:Category:User essays]] categorization for pages in the "User:" namespace, but can be used to add them manually to [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]], in addition to the automatic user category. * {{para|nocat|y}} or {{para|demo|y}} – Bypass all categorization, when the template is used for demo purposes, e.g. in template documentation, on talk pages, etc. * {{para|style}} – Pass arbitrary CSS to the [[Template:Ombox]] base template that this template uses. == TemplateData == {{collapse top|[[Wikipedia:TemplateData|TemplateData]] documentation used by [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] and other tools}} {{TemplateData header|noheader=1}} { "description": "", "params": { "page": {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Guideline or other page being interpreted"}, "shortcut1" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "shortcut2" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "shortcut3" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "nocat" : {"type": "string","description": "Any value prevents addition of project category"} } } {{collapse bottom}} == See also == {{#if:{{{howto|}}}| * {{tlx|How-to}} – the cleanup/dispute tag for articles written in a "how-to" style. * {{tlx|Information page}} – the banner template for pages that are more just informational than directly instructional like [[WP:GOV]]. | * {{tlx|Wikipedia how-to}} – the banner template for pages that are more directly instructional than just informational like [[H:EDIT]]. }} * {{tlx|Essay|interprets{{=}}}} – the banner template for pages that are more opinionated then instructional or technical; there are several parameters and variations. * {{tlx|Supplement|interprets{{=}}}} – to tag a well-established page that adds something to a policy or guideline, to make up for a deficiency, and when it is referenced in the guideline or policy like [[WP:BRD]]. * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Wikipedia namespace]] – for other "Wikipedia:"-namespace banner templates. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia header templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Distinguish|Template:Information}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{Auto short description|conditions=when it is used in Wikipedia, Help, or User space}} {{#if:{{{howto|}}} |{{distinguish|text = the article tone dispute tag, [[Template:How-to]]}} | }} This is the page banner template for [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to{{!}}Wikipedia how-to|information pages{{!}}Wikipedia information pages}}]]. It can be placed on top of [[WP:GOVPS|administration pages]] (not-articles) when appropriate (see [[WP:INFOPAGES]] for details). This usually means pages in the "Wikipedia:" and "Help:" namespaces, but sometimes {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to guides|information pages}} also exist as user subpages. == Categorization == If a page that uses this template is in the "Wikipedia:" or "Help:" [[WP:Namespace|namespace]], then this template adds [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]] to the page. If the page is in the [[WP:User pages|"User:"]] namespace, it will be put into [[:Category:User essays]]. If your page is just a draft, please use the {{para|nocat}} parameter to prevent categorization, until it is finished. If it is in some other namespace, it will not be auto-categorized, and it may be in the wrong place. == Usage == This template can be used as is, like this: :{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} But it can also take up to three [[Wikipedia:Shortcut|shortcuts]] as parameters. It then displays a small shortcut box inside it. Like this: :{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|WP:SHORT|WP:LONG}} Then it looks like this: {{ {{BASEPAGENAME}}|WP:SHORT|WP:LONG|demo=y}} If you want to feed more than one or two shortcuts then the shortcut box becomes too high, which doesn't look good. In such a case it is better to use a {{tlc|shortcut}} box directly {{em|below}} this template, like this: {{block indent|1= {{tlx|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}
{{tlx|shortcut|WP:SHORT|WP:SHORT2|WP:SHORT3|WP:SHORT4}} }} === Optional parameters === * {{para|1}} or {{para|sc1}}, {{para|shortcut1}}, {{para|shortcut}}, or first unnamed parameter – First [[WP:Shortcut|shortcut]]. Don't include [[...]] linking brackets in this or other shortcut parameters. * {{para|2}} or {{para|sc2}}, {{para|shortcut2}}, or first unnamed parameter – Second shortcut * {{para|3}} or {{para|sc3}}, {{para|shortcut3}}, or first unnamed parameter – Third shortcut (deprecated; please use separate [[Template:Shortcut]] for three or more) * {{para|interprets}} or {{para|page}} or {{para|pages}} – Specify name of page (policy, process, etc.) that this essay provides advice about. For a single page, it is not necessary to include [[...]] linking brackets;. This will replace the wording "{{#if:{{{howto|}}}|some aspect or aspects of Wikipedia's norms and practices|Wikipedia's norms and practices}}". If more than one page and/or any notes are intended, links must be manually coded, e.g.: {{para|interprets|[[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] policy and the [[Wikipedia:Identifying reliable sources]] guideline}} * {{para|sort-by}} – Specify a [[WP:Categorization#Sort keys|sort key]] for the category. For example, if the how-to page is [[Wikipedia:Producing maps with xplanet]] and you want it category-sorted to appear under "X", use {{para|sort-by|Xplanet, Producing maps with}}. This has no effect on the user essays category. * {{para|category}} – Specify a complete wikilink (i.e, {{em|do}} include the [[...]] linking brackets) to one or more categories to override the default [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]]. May include a category sort; example: [[Category:WikiProject Underwater Basketweaving|Article structure advice]] This parameter does not replace the [[:Category:User essays]] categorization for pages in the "User:" namespace, but can be used to add them manually to [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]], in addition to the automatic user category. * {{para|nocat|y}} or {{para|demo|y}} – Bypass all categorization, when the template is used for demo purposes, e.g. in template documentation, on talk pages, etc. * {{para|style}} – Pass arbitrary CSS to the [[Template:Ombox]] base template that this template uses. == TemplateData == {{collapse top|[[Wikipedia:TemplateData|TemplateData]] documentation used by [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] and other tools}} {{TemplateData header|noheader=1}} { "description": "", "params": { "page": {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Guideline or other page being interpreted"}, "shortcut1" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "shortcut2" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "shortcut3" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "nocat" : {"type": "string","description": "Any value prevents addition of project category"} } } {{collapse bottom}} == See also == {{#if:{{{howto|}}}| * {{tlx|How-to}} – the cleanup/dispute tag for articles written in a "how-to" style. * {{tlx|Information page}} – the banner template for pages that are more just informational than directly instructional like [[WP:GOV]]. | * {{tlx|Wikipedia how-to}} – the banner template for pages that are more directly instructional than just informational like [[:en:H:EDIT|H:EDIT]]. }} * {{tlx|Essay|interprets{{=}}}} – the banner template for pages that are more opinionated then instructional or technical; there are several parameters and variations. * {{tlx|Supplement|interprets{{=}}}} – to tag a well-established page that adds something to a policy or guideline, to make up for a deficiency, and when it is referenced in the guideline or policy like [[WP:BRD]]. * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Wikipedia namespace]] – for other "Wikipedia:"-namespace banner templates. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia header templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Distinguish|Template:Information}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{Auto short description|conditions=when it is used in Wikipedia, Help, or User space}} {{#if:{{{howto|}}} |{{distinguish|text = the article tone dispute tag, [[Template:How-to]]}} | }} This is the page banner template for [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to{{!}}Wikipedia how-to|information pages{{!}}Wikipedia information pages}}]]. It can be placed on top of [[WP:GOVPS|administration pages]] (not-articles) when appropriate (see [[WP:INFOPAGES]] for details). This usually means pages in the "Wikipedia:" and "Help:" namespaces, but sometimes {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to guides|information pages}} also exist as user subpages. == Categorization == If a page that uses this template is in the "Wikipedia:" or "Help:" [[WP:Namespace|namespace]], then this template adds [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]] to the page. If the page is in the [[WP:User pages|"User:"]] namespace, it will be put into [[:Category:User essays]]. If your page is just a draft, please use the {{para|nocat}} parameter to prevent categorization, until it is finished. If it is in some other namespace, it will not be auto-categorized, and it may be in the wrong place. == Usage == This template can be used as is, like this: :{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} But it can also take up to three [[Wikipedia:Shortcut|shortcuts]] as parameters. It then displays a small shortcut box inside it. Like this: :{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|WP:SHORT|WP:LONG}} Then it looks like this: {{ {{BASEPAGENAME}}|WP:SHORT|WP:LONG|demo=y}} If you want to feed more than one or two shortcuts then the shortcut box becomes too high, which doesn't look good. In such a case it is better to use a {{tlc|shortcut}} box directly {{em|below}} this template, like this: {{block indent|1= {{tlx|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}
{{tlx|shortcut|WP:SHORT|WP:SHORT2|WP:SHORT3|WP:SHORT4}} }} === Optional parameters === * {{para|1}} or {{para|sc1}}, {{para|shortcut1}}, {{para|shortcut}}, or first unnamed parameter – First [[WP:Shortcut|shortcut]]. Don't include [[...]] linking brackets in this or other shortcut parameters. * {{para|2}} or {{para|sc2}}, {{para|shortcut2}}, or first unnamed parameter – Second shortcut * {{para|3}} or {{para|sc3}}, {{para|shortcut3}}, or first unnamed parameter – Third shortcut (deprecated; please use separate [[Template:Shortcut]] for three or more) * {{para|interprets}} or {{para|page}} or {{para|pages}} – Specify name of page (policy, process, etc.) that this essay provides advice about. For a single page, it is not necessary to include [[...]] linking brackets;. This will replace the wording "{{#if:{{{howto|}}}|some aspect or aspects of Wikipedia's norms and practices|Wikipedia's norms and practices}}". If more than one page and/or any notes are intended, links must be manually coded, e.g.: {{para|interprets|[[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] policy and the [[Wikipedia:Identifying reliable sources]] guideline}} * {{para|sort-by}} – Specify a [[WP:Categorization#Sort keys|sort key]] for the category. For example, if the how-to page is [[Wikipedia:Producing maps with xplanet]] and you want it category-sorted to appear under "X", use {{para|sort-by|Xplanet, Producing maps with}}. This has no effect on the user essays category. * {{para|category}} – Specify a complete wikilink (i.e, {{em|do}} include the [[...]] linking brackets) to one or more categories to override the default [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]]. May include a category sort; example: [[Category:WikiProject Underwater Basketweaving|Article structure advice]] This parameter does not replace the [[:Category:User essays]] categorization for pages in the "User:" namespace, but can be used to add them manually to [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]], in addition to the automatic user category. * {{para|nocat|y}} or {{para|demo|y}} – Bypass all categorization, when the template is used for demo purposes, e.g. in template documentation, on talk pages, etc. * {{para|style}} – Pass arbitrary CSS to the [[Template:Ombox]] base template that this template uses. == TemplateData == {{collapse top|[[Wikipedia:TemplateData|TemplateData]] documentation used by [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] and other tools}} {{TemplateData header|noheader=1}} { "description": "", "params": { "page": {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Guideline or other page being interpreted"}, "shortcut1" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "shortcut2" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "shortcut3" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "nocat" : {"type": "string","description": "Any value prevents addition of project category"} } } {{collapse bottom}} == See also == {{#if:{{{howto|}}}| * {{tlx|How-to}} – the cleanup/dispute tag for articles written in a "how-to" style. * {{tlx|Information page}} – the banner template for pages that are more just informational than directly instructional like [[WP:GOV]]. | * {{tlx|Wikipedia how-to}} – the banner template for pages that are more directly instructional than just informational like [[:en:H:EDIT|H:EDIT]]. }} * {{tlx|Essay|interprets{{=}}}} – the banner template for pages that are more opinionated then instructional or technical; there are several parameters and variations. * {{tlx|Supplement|interprets{{=}}}} – to tag a well-established page that adds something to a policy or guideline, to make up for a deficiency, and when it is referenced in the guideline or policy like [[WP:BRD]]. * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Wikipedia namespace]] – for other "Wikipedia:"-namespace banner templates. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia header templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Distinguish|Template:Information}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{Auto short description|conditions=when it is used in Wikipedia, Help, or User space}} {{#if:{{{howto|}}} |{{distinguish|text = the article tone dispute tag, [[Template:How-to]]}} | }} This is the page banner template for [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to{{!}}Wikipedia how-to|information pages{{!}}Wikipedia information pages}}]]. It can be placed on top of [[WP:GOVPS|administration pages]] (not-articles) when appropriate (see [[WP:INFOPAGES]] for details). This usually means pages in the "Wikipedia:" and "Help:" namespaces, but sometimes {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to guides|information pages}} also exist as user subpages. == Categorization == If a page that uses this template is in the "Wikipedia:" or "Help:" [[WP:Namespace|namespace]], then this template adds [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]] to the page. If the page is in the [[WP:User pages|"User:"]] namespace, it will be put into [[:Category:User essays]]. If your page is just a draft, please use the {{para|nocat}} parameter to prevent categorization, until it is finished. If it is in some other namespace, it will not be auto-categorized, and it may be in the wrong place. == Usage == This template can be used as is, like this: :{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} But it can also take up to three [[Wikipedia:Shortcut|shortcuts]] as parameters. It then displays a small shortcut box inside it. Like this: :{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|WP:SHORT|WP:LONG}} Then it looks like this: {{ {{BASEPAGENAME}}|WP:SHORT|WP:LONG|demo=y}} If you want to feed more than one or two shortcuts then the shortcut box becomes too high, which doesn't look good. In such a case it is better to use a {{tlc|shortcut}} box directly {{em|below}} this template, like this: {{block indent|1= {{tlx|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}
{{tlx|shortcut|WP:SHORT|WP:SHORT2|WP:SHORT3|WP:SHORT4}} }} === Optional parameters === * {{para|1}} or {{para|sc1}}, {{para|shortcut1}}, {{para|shortcut}}, or first unnamed parameter – First [[WP:Shortcut|shortcut]]. Don't include [[...]] linking brackets in this or other shortcut parameters. * {{para|2}} or {{para|sc2}}, {{para|shortcut2}}, or first unnamed parameter – Second shortcut * {{para|3}} or {{para|sc3}}, {{para|shortcut3}}, or first unnamed parameter – Third shortcut (deprecated; please use separate [[Template:Shortcut]] for three or more) * {{para|interprets}} or {{para|page}} or {{para|pages}} – Specify name of page (policy, process, etc.) that this essay provides advice about. For a single page, it is not necessary to include [[...]] linking brackets;. This will replace the wording "{{#if:{{{howto|}}}|some aspect or aspects of Wikipedia's norms and practices|Wikipedia's norms and practices}}". If more than one page and/or any notes are intended, links must be manually coded, e.g.: {{para|interprets|[[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] policy and the [[Wikipedia:Identifying reliable sources]] guideline}} * {{para|sort-by}} – Specify a [[WP:Categorization#Sort keys|sort key]] for the category. For example, if the how-to page is [[Wikipedia:Producing maps with xplanet]] and you want it category-sorted to appear under "X", use {{para|sort-by|Xplanet, Producing maps with}}. This has no effect on the user essays category. * {{para|category}} – Specify a complete wikilink (i.e, {{em|do}} include the [[...]] linking brackets) to one or more categories to override the default [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]]. May include a category sort; example: [[Category:WikiProject Underwater Basketweaving|Article structure advice]] This parameter does not replace the [[:Category:User essays]] categorization for pages in the "User:" namespace, but can be used to add them manually to [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]], in addition to the automatic user category. * {{para|nocat|y}} or {{para|demo|y}} – Bypass all categorization, when the template is used for demo purposes, e.g. in template documentation, on talk pages, etc. * {{para|style}} – Pass arbitrary CSS to the [[Template:Ombox]] base template that this template uses. == TemplateData == {{collapse top|[[Wikipedia:TemplateData|TemplateData]] documentation used by [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] and other tools}} {{TemplateData header|noheader=1}} { "description": "", "params": { "page": {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Guideline or other page being interpreted"}, "shortcut1" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "shortcut2" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "shortcut3" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "nocat" : {"type": "string","description": "Any value prevents addition of project category"} } } {{collapse bottom}} == See also == {{#if:{{{howto|}}}| * {{tlx|How-to}} – the cleanup/dispute tag for articles written in a "how-to" style. * {{tlx|Information page}} – the banner template for pages that are more just informational than directly instructional like [[WP:GOV]]. | * {{tlx|Wikipedia how-to}} – the banner template for pages that are more directly instructional than just informational like [[:en:H:EDIT|H:EDIT]]. }} * {{tlx|Essay|interprets{{=}}}} – the banner template for pages that are more opinionated then instructional or technical; there are several parameters and variations. * {{tlx|Supplement|interprets{{=}}}} – to tag a well-established page that adds something to a policy or guideline, to make up for a deficiency, and when it is referenced in the guideline or policy like [[WP:BRD]]. * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Wikipedia namespace]] – for other "Wikipedia:"-namespace banner templates. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia header templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Distinguish|Template:Information}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{Auto short description|conditions=when it is used in Wikipedia, Help, or User space}} {{#if:{{{howto|}}} |{{distinguish|text = the article tone dispute tag, [[Template:How-to]]}} | }} This is the page banner template for [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to{{!}}Wikipedia how-to|information pages{{!}}Wikipedia information pages}}]]. It can be placed on top of [[WP:GOVPS|administration pages]] (not-articles) when appropriate (see [[WP:INFOPAGES]] for details). This usually means pages in the "Wikipedia:" and "Help:" namespaces, but sometimes {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to guides|information pages}} also exist as user subpages. == Categorization == If a page that uses this template is in the "Wikipedia:" or "Help:" [[WP:Namespace|namespace]], then this template adds [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]] to the page. If the page is in the [[WP:User pages|"User:"]] namespace, it will be put into [[:Category:User essays]]. If your page is just a draft, please use the {{para|nocat}} parameter to prevent categorization, until it is finished. If it is in some other namespace, it will not be auto-categorized, and it may be in the wrong place. == Usage == This template can be used as is, like this: :{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} But it can also take up to three [[Wikipedia:Shortcut|shortcuts]] as parameters. It then displays a small shortcut box inside it. Like this: :{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|WP:SHORT|WP:LONG}} Then it looks like this: {{ {{BASEPAGENAME}}|WP:SHORT|WP:LONG|demo=y}} If you want to feed more than one or two shortcuts then the shortcut box becomes too high, which doesn't look good. In such a case it is better to use a {{tlc|shortcut}} box directly {{em|below}} this template, like this: {{block indent|1= {{tlx|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}
{{tlx|shortcut|WP:SHORT|WP:SHORT2|WP:SHORT3|WP:SHORT4}} }} === Optional parameters === * {{para|1}} or {{para|sc1}}, {{para|shortcut1}}, {{para|shortcut}}, or first unnamed parameter – First [[WP:Shortcut|shortcut]]. Don't include [[...]] linking brackets in this or other shortcut parameters. * {{para|2}} or {{para|sc2}}, {{para|shortcut2}}, or first unnamed parameter – Second shortcut * {{para|3}} or {{para|sc3}}, {{para|shortcut3}}, or first unnamed parameter – Third shortcut (deprecated; please use separate [[Template:Shortcut]] for three or more) * {{para|interprets}} or {{para|page}} or {{para|pages}} – Specify name of page (policy, process, etc.) that this essay provides advice about. For a single page, it is not necessary to include [[...]] linking brackets;. This will replace the wording "{{#if:{{{howto|}}}|some aspect or aspects of Wikipedia's norms and practices|Wikipedia's norms and practices}}". If more than one page and/or any notes are intended, links must be manually coded, e.g.: {{para|interprets|[[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] policy and the [[Wikipedia:Identifying reliable sources]] guideline}} * {{para|sort-by}} – Specify a [[WP:Categorization#Sort keys|sort key]] for the category. For example, if the how-to page is [[Wikipedia:Producing maps with xplanet]] and you want it category-sorted to appear under "X", use {{para|sort-by|Xplanet, Producing maps with}}. This has no effect on the user essays category. * {{para|category}} – Specify a complete wikilink (i.e, {{em|do}} include the [[...]] linking brackets) to one or more categories to override the default [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]]. May include a category sort; example: [[Category:WikiProject Underwater Basketweaving|Article structure advice]] This parameter does not replace the [[:Category:User essays]] categorization for pages in the "User:" namespace, but can be used to add them manually to [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]], in addition to the automatic user category. * {{para|nocat|y}} or {{para|demo|y}} – Bypass all categorization, when the template is used for demo purposes, e.g. in template documentation, on talk pages, etc. * {{para|style}} – Pass arbitrary CSS to the [[Template:Ombox]] base template that this template uses. == TemplateData == {{collapse top|[[Wikipedia:TemplateData|TemplateData]] documentation used by [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] and other tools}} {{TemplateData header|noheader=1}} { "description": "", "params": { "page": {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Guideline or other page being interpreted"}, "shortcut1" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "shortcut2" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "shortcut3" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "nocat" : {"type": "string","description": "Any value prevents addition of project category"} } } {{collapse bottom}} == See also == {{#if:{{{howto|}}}| * {{tlx|How-to}} – the cleanup/dispute tag for articles written in a "how-to" style. * {{tlx|Information page}} – the banner template for pages that are more just informational than directly instructional like [[WP:GOV]]. | * {{tlx|Wikipedia how-to}} – the banner template for pages that are more directly instructional than just informational like [[:en:H:EDIT|H:EDIT]]. }} * {{tlx|Essay|interprets{{=}}}} – the banner template for pages that are more opinionated then instructional or technical; there are several parameters and variations. * {{tlx|Supplement|interprets{{=}}}} – to tag a well-established page that adds something to a policy or guideline, to make up for a deficiency, and when it is referenced in the guideline or policy like [[WP:BRD]]. * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Wikipedia namespace]] – for other "Wikipedia:"-namespace banner templates. {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikipedia header templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Distinguish|Template:Information}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{Auto short description|conditions=when it is used in Wikipedia, Help, or User space}} {{#if:{{{howto|}}} |{{distinguish|text = the article tone dispute tag, [[Template:How-to]]}} | }} This is the page banner template for [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to{{!}}Wikipedia how-to|information pages{{!}}Wikipedia information pages}}]]. It can be placed on top of [[WP:GOVPS|administration pages]] (not-articles) when appropriate (see [[WP:INFOPAGES]] for details). This usually means pages in the "Wikipedia:" and "Help:" namespaces, but sometimes {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to guides|information pages}} also exist as user subpages. == Categorization == If a page that uses this template is in the "Wikipedia:" or "Help:" [[WP:Namespace|namespace]], then this template adds [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]] to the page. If the page is in the [[WP:User pages|"User:"]] namespace, it will be put into [[:Category:User essays]]. If your page is just a draft, please use the {{para|nocat}} parameter to prevent categorization, until it is finished. If it is in some other namespace, it will not be auto-categorized, and it may be in the wrong place. == Usage == This template can be used as is, like this: :{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} But it can also take up to three [[Wikipedia:Shortcut|shortcuts]] as parameters. It then displays a small shortcut box inside it. Like this: :{{tlc|{{BASEPAGENAME}}|WP:SHORT|WP:LONG}} Then it looks like this: {{ {{BASEPAGENAME}}|WP:SHORT|WP:LONG|demo=y}} If you want to feed more than one or two shortcuts then the shortcut box becomes too high, which doesn't look good. In such a case it is better to use a {{tlc|shortcut}} box directly {{em|below}} this template, like this: {{block indent|1= {{tlx|{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}
{{tlx|shortcut|WP:SHORT|WP:SHORT2|WP:SHORT3|WP:SHORT4}} }} === Optional parameters === * {{para|1}} or {{para|sc1}}, {{para|shortcut1}}, {{para|shortcut}}, or first unnamed parameter – First [[WP:Shortcut|shortcut]]. Don't include [[...]] linking brackets in this or other shortcut parameters. * {{para|2}} or {{para|sc2}}, {{para|shortcut2}}, or first unnamed parameter – Second shortcut * {{para|3}} or {{para|sc3}}, {{para|shortcut3}}, or first unnamed parameter – Third shortcut (deprecated; please use separate [[Template:Shortcut]] for three or more) * {{para|interprets}} or {{para|page}} or {{para|pages}} – Specify name of page (policy, process, etc.) that this essay provides advice about. For a single page, it is not necessary to include [[...]] linking brackets;. This will replace the wording "{{#if:{{{howto|}}}|some aspect or aspects of Wikipedia's norms and practices|Wikipedia's norms and practices}}". If more than one page and/or any notes are intended, links must be manually coded, e.g.: {{para|interprets|[[Wikipedia:Verifiability]] policy and the [[Wikipedia:Identifying reliable sources]] guideline}} * {{para|sort-by}} – Specify a [[WP:Categorization#Sort keys|sort key]] for the category. For example, if the how-to page is [[Wikipedia:Producing maps with xplanet]] and you want it category-sorted to appear under "X", use {{para|sort-by|Xplanet, Producing maps with}}. This has no effect on the user essays category. * {{para|category}} – Specify a complete wikilink (i.e, {{em|do}} include the [[...]] linking brackets) to one or more categories to override the default [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]]. May include a category sort; example: This parameter does not replace the [[:Category:User essays]] categorization for pages in the "User:" namespace, but can be used to add them manually to [[:Category:Wikipedia {{#if:{{{howto|}}}|how-to|information pages}}]], in addition to the automatic user category. * {{para|nocat|y}} or {{para|demo|y}} – Bypass all categorization, when the template is used for demo purposes, e.g. in template documentation, on talk pages, etc. * {{para|style}} – Pass arbitrary CSS to the [[Template:Ombox]] base template that this template uses. == TemplateData == {{collapse top|[[Wikipedia:TemplateData|TemplateData]] documentation used by [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] and other tools}} {{TemplateData header|noheader=1}} { "description": "", "params": { "page": {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Guideline or other page being interpreted"}, "shortcut1" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "shortcut2" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "shortcut3" : {"type": "wiki-page-name","description": "Shortcut to this page"}, "nocat" : {"type": "string","description": "Any value prevents addition of project category"} } } {{collapse bottom}} == See also == {{#if:{{{howto|}}}| * {{tlx|How-to}} – the cleanup/dispute tag for articles written in a "how-to" style. * {{tlx|Information page}} – the banner template for pages that are more just informational than directly instructional like [[WP:GOV]]. | * {{tlx|Wikipedia how-to}} – the banner template for pages that are more directly instructional than just informational like [[:en:H:EDIT|H:EDIT]]. }} * {{tlx|Essay|interprets{{=}}}} – the banner template for pages that are more opinionated then instructional or technical; there are several parameters and variations. * {{tlx|Supplement|interprets{{=}}}} – to tag a well-established page that adds something to a policy or guideline, to make up for a deficiency, and when it is referenced in the guideline or policy like [[WP:BRD]]. * [[Wikipedia:Template index/Wikipedia namespace]] – for other "Wikipedia:"-namespace banner templates. {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:WikiProject Underwater Basketweaving|Article structure advice]] [[Category:Wikipedia header templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
